title: Section 5 requires the whole tort to take place within the UK

evidence.clean_text: Mr White submitted that s 5 requires the whole tort to take place within the UK and that, subject to de minimis exceptions, where a tort takes place partly inside and partly outside the UK, then it falls outside the exception in s 5 and the foreign state is entitled to immunity: Dickinson, Lindsay and Loonam, State Immunity: Selected Materials and Commentary (OUP, 2004) pp369-370.
